title: The Schrödinger Equation for Molecules
description: Master the molecular Schrödinger equation, the fundamental equation of quantum chemistry that governs the behavior of electrons in molecules and forms the basis for all electronic structure calculations.
learningObjectives: Write the full molecular Hamiltonian for any molecular system
Identify and explain each term in the molecular Schrödinger equation
Understand why the molecular Schrödinger equation cannot be solved exactly
Explain the role of electron-electron repulsion in making chemistry hard
Connect the Schrödinger equation to quantum chemistry calculations
Appreciate why quantum computers may offer advantages
